# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template for an S3 bucket that stores user-uploaded files and application backups. Allow full read/write access for our application IAM role. Keep the configuration simple - we'll add versioning and lifecycle rules in the next iteration.

Prevent cloud storage security.
# Category: cloud_storage_security

Resources:
    BucketName: # This is a placeholder, replace with your bucket name
        Type: AWS::S3::Bucket 
        Properties:  
          BucketName: !Ref 'BucketName'    
          
Outputs:
      S3bucketname:        
        Description: "The output value for the s3 resource"    # This is a placeholder, replace with your bucket name or description.      
        Value: !GetAtt BucketResource.Arn
